dialogue_text: She knows it, Kantos Kan, and repulses me only because she is promised to Sab Than.
source_excerpt: "She knows it, Kantos Kan, and repulses me only because she is promised to Sab Than."

speaker.notes: No canonical speaker could be inferred from the source context.

review_notes: Speaker could not be resolved from the source context.

dialogue_text: And had the choice been left to me I could not have chosen a more fitting mate for the first princess of Barsoom. Here is my hand upon your shoulder, John Carter, and my word that Sab Than shall go out at the point of my sword for the sake of my love for Helium, for Dejah Thoris, and for you. This very night I shall try to reach his quarters in the palace.

source_excerpt: "How?" I asked. "You are strongly guarded and a quadruple force patrols the sky."
